title: goodenia glabrata
intro: Goodenia glabrata, also known as rough goodenia, is a native Australian plant belonging to the Goodeniaceae family. It is a shrub with a unique ability to thrive in dry environments and is valued for its medicinal properties. The plant is used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Goodenia glabrata are often used in teas, infusions, and topical applications to harness its health benefits.
